214 G1EA G1EA_SELF_LOC_UNIT (G1EA) Locomotion on Unit Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: locomotion on unit - ADL self-performance "-" = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or 2 times during last 7 days, 1 = Supervision - Oversight, encouragement or cueing provided 3 or more times
